name: Adnene Khalfa
title: Founder
bio: Over a decade of experience building distributed systems, serverless architectures, and developer tools. Previously led engineering teams at high-growth startups. Passionate about eliminating undifferentiated infrastructure work so developers can focus on their products.

name: RocketHooks Team
title: Engineering Team
bio: The team behind RocketHooks, building the API transformation platform that turns API endpoints into real-time event streams. Experts in serverless architecture, event-driven systems, and developer experience.
